articles.headline: World Cup Daily live: Remix of teen Haaland's rap song hits No. 1; Spain to face Belgium
articles.description: Enjoy all the features, news, video analysis and color from around the 2026 FIFA World Cup as we start the second day of quarterfinals action.

images.name: Erling Haaland rap song blog lead [1296x729]
Haaland: All the pressure is on England in quarterfinal
images.caption: Haaland: All the pressure is on England in quarterfinal

articles.headline: England have Marc Guéhi, Declan Rice fitness concerns before Norway World Cup quarterfinal - sources
articles.description: Marc Guéhi has emerged as an injury concern ahead of England's World Cup quarterfinal against Norway after suffering a hamstring issue, sources have told ESPN.

images.name: Guehi and Rice [1296x729]
images.alt: Marc Guehi #6 and Declan Rice #4 of England react at the hydration break during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group L match between England and Ghana at Boston Stadium on June 23, 2026 in Foxborough, Massachusetts.
images.credit: Maddie Meyer - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

images.name: Haaland: All the pressure is on England in quarterfinal
images.caption: Haaland: All the pressure is on England in quarterfinal

articles.headline: Harry Kane vs. Erling Haaland: How do England, Norway stars compare? Key stats before World Cup clash
articles.description: Who will come out on top in the World Cup quarterfinal, Harry Kane or Erling Haaland? Here is what the stats say.

images.name: Harry Kane Erling Haaland [1296x729]
images.alt: An image of Harry Kane alongside one of Erling Haaland.
images.credit: Photo by Luis Cano/Jam Media/Getty Images and Photo by Richard Sellers/Sportsphoto/Allstar via Getty Images

images.name: Erling Haaland [1296x729]
images.alt: Erling Haaland wears a viking helmet.
images.credit: (Photo by Julian Finney - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images)

images.name: Harry Kane penalty [1296x729]
images.alt: Harry Kane takes the penalty against Mexico.

images.name: Odegaard: Norway's quarterfinal against England a 'massive test'
images.caption: Odegaard: Norway's quarterfinal against England a 'massive test'

articles.headline: Police officer injured, arrests made amid London disorder after France beat Morocco
articles.description: A police officer was injured and four people were arrested after disorder broke out in London following France's 2-0 win against Morocco in the World Cup quarterfinal on Thursday.

images.name: Metropolitan Police stock [1296x729]
images.alt: The logo of the Metropolitan Police can be seen on a police car in central London.
images.credit: Anna Ross/picture alliance via Getty Images

articles.headline: Instead of its biggest World Cup star, Pulisic was U.S.'s biggest mystery
articles.description: In his prime at a World Cup on home soil, this summer was Christian Pulisic's moment, but for a number of reasons, he failed to meet it.

articles.headline: World Cup quarterfinals: How we got here, predictions, odds
articles.description: Four weeks after the World Cup began, the quarterfinals are underway, with each team three wins from lifting the trophy. Next up, Spain vs. Belgium.

images.name: Burley: Spain need more than Yamal to win World Cup
images.caption: Burley: Spain need more than Yamal to win World Cup

article.headline: Mikel Oyarzabal scores twice as Spain eliminate Austria from World Cup
article.description: Mikel Oyarzabal scored twice as Spain proved too strong for Austria in a 3-0 win at the SoFi Stadium to take their place in the round of 16 of the World Cup.
article.linkText: Oyarzabal stars, Spain KO Austria from World Cup

images.name: Yamal: Spain don't fear anybody at the World Cup

article.story:
Mikel Oyarzabal scored twice as Spain proved too strong for Austria in a 3-0 win at the SoFi Stadium to take their place in the round of 16 of the World Cup.

After seeing a goal from full-back Marc Cucurella ruled out for a foul at a corner, the European champions went ahead in the 36th minute through Oyarzabal's sweeping finish.

Spain -- looking to secure a first win in a World Cup knockout match since lifting the trophy in 2010 -- eventually made their dominance count again when Tottenham defender Pedro Porro headed in a second just after the hour.

Oyarzabal scored his second goal with a minute left of normal time as Luis de la Fuente's side set up a date with either Portugal or Croatia for a spot in the quarterfinals.

Spain had made a bright start in Inglewood, Los Angeles as Barcelona forward Lamine Yamal fired in an early shot from the edge of the penalty area which was straight at Austria goalkeeper Alexander Schlager.

Austria -- who had secured their place in the last 32 as runners-up in Group J behind Argentina with a late goal to snatch a 3-3 draw with Algeria -- then created their first opportunity when a floated cross from Marcel Sabitzer picked out Michael Gregoritsch at the far post, but the Augsburg frontman could not get enough contact on his header.

Spain thought they had taken the lead on the half-hour when Cucurella lashed the ball in following a corner, but the goal was somewhat controversially ruled out for a foul on Schlager as the floated corner went through a packed six-yard box.

Austria keeper Schlager then showed good reactions to get down to push away an angled effort from Oyarzabal after another lively run from Yamal.

Spain eventually made their pressure count in the 36th minute when Real Sociedad forward Oyarzabal swept in a low cross from Cucurella for an 11th goal in his last 10 international appearances.

In first-half stoppage time, Álex Baena saw his 25-yard curling free-kick tipped on to the crossbar and Yamal's follow-up shot from the rebound was then saved at point-blank range by Schlager.

Austria boss Ralf Rangnick made a double substitution to his midfield for the second half, sending on Florian Grillitsch and Carney Chukwuemeka, a former England youth international who had spells at Aston Villa and Chelsea.

It was Spain, though, who looked to pick up from where they had left off, with Oyarzabal heading over from a corner before Rodri's low shot was deflected just wide.

After Austria substitute Sasa Kalajdzic, who had only just come on, sent a looping header over, Spain doubled their lead in the 66th minute when Porro arrived in the penalty area to finish off a sweeping move as he nodded in Baena's cross for his first international goal.

Austria looked to rally as Stefan Posch headed wide, but Oyarzabal made sure there would be no late drama when he knocked in a low cross from Cucurella in the 89th minute.

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: duelsWon

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: aerialsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: touches
